title: Simple left join with count
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.users_with_post_counts/0` that returns each user with their post count (including users with zero posts). Use a left_join on posts, group by user fields, and select `{u.id, u.name, count(p.id)}`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Left-join + simple aggregate. Canonical pattern for counting children per parent.
